Zone,Ledger,Flex3,Co,Crcy,Flex9,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,Assgnmt,RefKey1,RefKey2,PC,TTY,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,CC
Doc Type,Ledger,Doc Hdr Text,Co,Crcy,DocNbr,PK,GL,GL Desc,Doc Amt,LC Amt,LC2 Amt,LC3 Amt,Txt,Assgnmt,Post to GL,Offset to GL,PC,TTY,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,CC
Flex3,Ledger,Co,Assgnmt,Crcy,GL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat ='' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set SubProd ='' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not SubProd in ('S20 FA','S20 FB')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[BudAct]' = 'FFH TP only' and not TP like 'F%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[BudAct]' = 'non-FFH only' and TP like 'F%'
update TransX set Contract = coalesce(Contract,''), UWYR = coalesce(UWYR,''), ReinName = coalesce(ReinName,'') where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Stat) (select KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,round(sum(case when Flex1 = '1' then Amt1 else 0 end),2) as Amt1,round(sum(case when Flex1 = '2' then Amt1 else 0 end),2) as Amt2, 0 as Amt3, 0 as Amt4, 0 as Amt5, 0 as Amt6, '1' as Stat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Stat is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0

update x set Amt3 = y.Amt1, Amt4 = y.Amt2 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Co = y.Co and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.TP = y.TP and x.BusCat = y.BusCat and x.SubProd = y.SubProd and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName

update x set Amt5 = y.Amt1, Amt6 = y.Amt2 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Co = y.Co and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.TP = y.TP and x.BusCat = y.BusCat and x.SubProd = y.SubProd and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName

update x set Amt7 = y.Amt1, Amt8 = y.Amt2 from TransX x inner join (Select KeyID,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Co = y.Co and x.Crcy = y.Crcy and x.GL = y.GL and x.PC = y.PC and x.TP = y.TP and x.BusCat = y.BusCat and x.SubProd = y.SubProd and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.ReinName = y.ReinName
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z003'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = Amt5 and Amt2 = Amt6 and Amt1 = Amt7 and Amt2 = Amt8 and Ledger = 'IF'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Amt1 = Amt7 and Amt2 = Amt8 and Ledger = 'UG'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Amt1 = Amt5 and Amt2 = Amt6 and Ledger = 'US'
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = Amt5 and Amt2 = Amt6 and Ledger = 'IF'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt2 = Amt4 and Ledger = 'UG'

update x set Rate1 = y.Rate from TransX x inner join (select Crcy,Rate from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and Crcy = 'EUR' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]')) y on x.Crcy = y.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Rate2 = y.Rate from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co inner join (select Crcy,Rate from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and Crcy = 'EUR' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]')) y on c.Crcy = y.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Rate3 = y.Rate from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co inner join (select Crcy,Rate from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from CrcyRates where Typ = substring('[GL]',5,99) and Crcy = 'EUR' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]')) y on c.LC3crcy = y.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Rate4 = (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then Rate1/Rate2 else (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '60' then Rate1/Rate3 else Rate1 end) end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[GL]',1,2) = '00'
update TransX set Rate4 = (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '60' then Rate2/Rate3 else Rate2 end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[GL]',1,2) = '10'
update TransX set Rate4 = 1/Rate3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[GL]',1,2) = '30'

update x set Rate3 = y.Rate from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co inner join (select Crcy,Rate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'MAVG' and EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from CrcyRates where Typ = 'MAVG' and Crcy = 'EUR' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]')) y on c.Crcy = y.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1 * Rate4,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt4 = round(Amt3 - Amt2,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt5 = (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then round(Amt4 * Rate3,2) else  0 end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger in ('IF','UG','US','Z003','Z004')
update TransX set Txt = cast(GL as varchar(10)) + ' - FX calc using [yyyy-mm-dd] [GL]', Assgnmt = GL from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set RefKey1 = z.Post_GL, RefKey2 = z.Offset_GL from TransX x inner join FX_Variant_Detail y on y.ID = '[version]' inner join FX_Map_Detail z on x.GL >= z.From_GL and x.GL <= z.Thru_GL and z.ID = y.FX_MAP_ID where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey1 = GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(RefKey1,'self') = 'self'
update TransX set RefKey2 = '4398001' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey2 is NULL and substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10'
update TransX set RefKey2 = 'no map' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey2 is NULL and substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,TTY,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,Assgnmt,RefKey1,RefKey2,PK,Flex3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,RefKey1 as GL,PC,TP,BusCat,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then 'S20 FB' else 'S20 FA' end) as SubProd,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then '990' else '991' end) as TTY,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,0 as Amt1,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt2,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then Amt5 else (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then Amt4 else 0 end) end) as Amt3,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '60' then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4,Txt,Assgnmt,RefKey1,RefKey2, (case when Amt4 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) as PK, 'FX calc [Yr]-[Mo]' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,PC,TP,BusCat,SubProd,TTY,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,Assgnmt,RefKey1,RefKey2,PK,Flex3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,RefKey2 as GL,PC,TP,BusCat,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then 'S20 FB' else 'S20 FA' end) as SubProd,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then '990' else '991' end) as TTY,UWYR,Contract,ReinName,0 as Amt1,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then -Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt2,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '10' then -Amt5 else (case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '30' then -Amt4 else 0 end) end) as Amt3,(case when substring('[GL]',3,2) = '60' then -Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4,Txt,Assgnmt,RefKey1,RefKey2, (case when Amt4 > 0 then '50' else '40' end) as PK, 'FX calc [Yr]-[Mo]' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
update x set Flex3 = 'Co Crcy ' + Flex3 from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Crcy = c.Crcy
update TransX set Amt4 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger in ('Z003','Z004','IF','UG','US')

update TransX set PC = '', CC = c.CCtr From TransX x inner join (Select Co,PCtr,max(CCtr) as CCtr from CCtrs group by Co,Pctr) c on x.Co = c.Co and x.PC = c.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Co < '5001' and x.GL > '6000000' and x.GL < '7100000'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Zone = substring(SubProd,5,2) where KeyID like '[batchID]'
update TransX set FSitem = substring(GL,1,2) where KeyID like '[batchID]-data2'
update x set Division = (case when x.Crcy = c.Crcy then 'Y' else 'N' end) from TransX x inner join Companies c on x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,Flex1) (select distinct '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.GLdesc,'Please extend GL# to Co#' as Flex1 from TransX x left join COAxCo c on x.Co = c.Co and x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Co is NULL)

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,Flex1) (select distinct '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,x.Ledger,x.Co,x.GL,x.GLdesc,'Please unblock GL# on Co#' as Flex1 from TransX x inner join COAxCo c on x.Co = c.Co and x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Blocked in ('Yes','Del'))

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,Flex1) (select distinct '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID,max(v.Ledger) as Ledger,v.Co,v.GL,v.GLdesc,'Please open period for Ledger/Co/GL combination' as Flex1 from (Select x.Co,x.GL,x.GLdesc,y.Ledger from TransX x inner join LedgerGroups y on x.Ledger = y.LedgerGroup and y.Ledger in ('IF','UG') inner join Companies z on x.Co = z.Co inner join PeriodStatus p on z.Period = p.Variant and x.GL >= p.FromAcct and x.GL <= p.ThruAcct and p.AccType = 'S' where ('[Yr]-[Mo]' < cast(p.FromYr as varchar(4)) + '-' + (case when p.FromPer < 10 then '0' else '' end) + cast(p.FromPer as varchar(2)) or '[Yr]-[Mo]' > cast(p.ThruYr as varchar(4)) + '-' + (case when p.ThruPer < 10 then '0' else '' end) + cast(p.ThruPer as varchar(2))) and x.KeyID = '[batchID]') v group by v.Co, v.GL,v.GLdesc)

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, '' as Ledger,'' as Co,'' as GL, '' as GLdesc,'no errors' as Flex1 from (Select count(*) as cnt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' ) a where cnt = 0)

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Division,Region,Location,Zone) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, x.ID as Flex1, y.ID as Flex2, y.Field_Name as Division, y.From_ID as Region, y.Thru_ID as  Location, y.Incl_Excl as Zone from FX_Variant_Detail x inner join FX_Select_Detail y on x.FX_Select_ID = y.ID where x.ID = '[version]')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Division,Region,Location,Zone) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, ID as Flex1, 'FX_Variant_Co' as Flex2, 'Co' as Division, From_Co as Region, Thru_Co as  Location, 'I' as Zone from FX_Variant_Co where ID = '[version]')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Division,Region,Location,Zone) (select '[batchID]-data5' as KeyID, x.ID as Flex1, y.ID as Flex2, y.From_GL as Division, y.Thru_GL as Region, y.Post_GL as  Location, y.Offset_GL as Zone from FX_Variant_Detail x inner join FX_Map_Detail y on x.FX_Map_ID = y.ID where x.ID = '[version]')

Insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Date1,Crcy,Rate1) (select '[batchID]-data6' as KeyID, x.Typ as GL, x.EffDate as Date1, x.Crcy, x.Rate as Rate1 from CrcyRates x inner join (Select Typ,max(EffDate) as EffDate from CrcyRates where Crcy = 'EUR' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]' group by Typ) y on x.Typ = y.Typ and x.EffDate = y.EffDate)
